repo.title: GitHub - mantinedev/mantine: A fully featured React components library · GitHub

manifest_entry.name: Mantine
manifest_entry.focus: rapid product UI with good defaults
teaches: how to move fast without turning the UI into chaos
avoid: letting default components define the whole product personality
using convenience as an excuse for weak hierarchy
manifest_entry.why_this_matters: Useful for learning how a productive design system stays coherent across many components.
manifest_entry.reusable_lesson: Fast shipping is compatible with good frontend structure when the system is disciplined.
